method: One Adzuna count per metro, corrected to CBSA geography by the in-sample in-CBSA fraction (f_m), divided by the metro's BLS LAUS labor force, x1000. Not repost-corrected, so read the map for relative intensity — absolute values run high. Metros with fewer than 50 in-CBSA postings or no labor force are shown gray.
caveats: Not repost-corrected; relative shading is the signal, not the number.
59 of 393 measured metros are below threshold (gray).
